scripts.dev: npm run build:ui && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names admin,viewer,server "npm run dev --workspace @bangumi-pipeline/admin" "npm run dev --workspace @bangumi-pipeline/viewer" "go run ./backend/cmd/server"
scripts.build:ui: npm run build --workspace @bangumi-pipeline/admin && npm run build --workspace @bangumi-pipeline/viewer
